South Africa • Contemporary South African seafood

Seebamboes

Seebamboes reflects Cape Town s current food appeal: local produce, seafood, and a more contemporary expression of South African dining.

★ 4.6 96 reviews
Image slot Restaurant Seebamboes Cape Town

About this restaurant

Seebamboes reflects Cape Town s current food appeal: local produce, seafood, and a more contemporary expression of South African dining.

Signature dish

Cape seafood, local produce, and modern South African flavors

Practical information

Cape Town restaurants book up quickly in summer. Reserve ahead and choose transport carefully for evening meals.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Cape Town.

Image slot Stay Kruger Shalati

Luxury safari hotel

Kruger Shalati - The Train on the Bridge

A distinctive Kruger stay built around restored train carriages on the Selati Bridge over the Sabie River.

★ 4.7 (519) From $800 / night
Skukuza, Kruger National Park
